highlights_headline: A packaging fix and an Android NDK refresh — no API changes shipped in this servicing build.

bullets.lead: Android NDK r27c with 16 KB page-size alignment
bullets.detail: The bundled Android natives are now built with NDK r27c and 16 KB-aligned to keep working on newer Android devices.
NuGet symbol packages now use the correct PackagePath attribute so debugger sources resolve as intended.

harfbuzz_summary: HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.0.1 picks up the same NDK r27c / 16 KB alignment refresh and packaging fix.
